name: weather
tagline: Popular ClawHub skill (423★): current weather and forecasts with no API key required.
verdict: Solid trust: it fetches public weather data only, no secrets touched, nothing leaves your machine. Docs don't say when it shouldn't be used (e.g. historical climate data), and there's no version field to track changes.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance (e.g. historical climate data).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes.
Fetches public weather data only — no secrets, no local data sent anywhere. Security clean.
